encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker unlocks the heavy iron gate leading to the nave
Breaking the gargoyle reveals the path to the inner sanctum
Banishing the priest causes the main altar to lower into the boss lair

boss.name: Void Patriarch
boss.victory_condition: Purify the patriarch using the Sun-Gold Seal

level.objective: Exorcise the corrupted heart of the Cathedral of Embers

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sproutling causes the trees to shift and reveal the path to the Riverbank

encounters.hazard: Slippery stones that reduce movement speed
encounters.trigger: The Sprite drops a key into the water, requiring the player to dive to the next cavern

encounters.hazard: Low ceilings that force the player to crouch
encounters.trigger: The Batling's screech shatters the wall leading to the boss chamber

boss.name: The Echoing Treant
boss.victory_condition: Play the Silver Chime to lull the Treant to sleep

level.objective: Retrieve the lost Moonbeam Whistle from the Whispering Woods

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Water
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to void-infused creatures

encounters.trigger: Opening the main doors signals the cultists in the Nave to prepare their ritual.
Defeating the Zealot shatters the barrier protecting the High Altar.

encounters.hazard: Unholy spikes rising from the ground
encounters.trigger: The death of the Guardian awakens the Boss.

boss.name: Void Abomination
boss.victory_condition: Seal the void rift while draining the beast's life force.

level.objective: Purify the desecrated cathedral and slay the Void Abomination.

encounters.hazard: Shifting floorboards that reveal bottomless pits

pickup.name: Essence of Reflection
pickup.effect: Allows the user to project a perfect duplicate of any item

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel unlocks the sealed elevator to the upper levels

encounters.hazard: Walls that pulse with sensory overload damage

pickup.name: Singing Crystal
pickup.effect: Emits a frequency that shatters physical manifestations

encounters.trigger: Solving the mirror puzzle summons the guardian of the sanctum

encounters.hazard: Gravity wells that pull the player into freezing mist

pickup.name: Prismatic Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the vault containing the Shattered Prism

encounters.trigger: The death of the Warden activates the seal on the boss chamber

boss.name: Aether-Touched Archon
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Prismatic Key into the central altar

level.objective: Retrieve the Shattered Prism from the heart of the Whispering Spire to restore balance to the Veil.
level.reward: The Veil Shroud cloak and infinite mana reserves

level.setting: An ancient, forest-shrouded temple reclaimed by nature

pickup.name: Moonlight Dew
pickup.effect: Grants ability to pierce magical shields

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sprite clears the mist, revealing the path to the Sunken Grotto.

pickup.name: Ethereal Essence
pickup.effect: Vibrates in the presence of Ancient Void energy

encounters.trigger: Collecting the Essence activates the bridge to the High Altar.

encounters.hazard: Sudden gusts of wind pushing the player back

pickup.name: Sunburst Fragment
pickup.effect: Emits blinding light that destabilizes shadow-bound entities

encounters.trigger: The Wisp dissipates, allowing the player to place the Sunburst Fragment into the final pedestal.

boss.name: Twilight Seraph
boss.victory_condition: Channel the power of the collected shards to banish the Seraph

level.objective: Restore the flow of the Sacred Spring by cleansing the corrupted monoliths.

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from the swirling vortex above.
encounters.trigger: Slaying the Stalker forces the drawbridge to collapse, revealing the inner courtyard.

encounters.hazard: Ground spikes appearing at random intervals.
encounters.trigger: The Construct explodes upon defeat, shattering the main gate to the spire.

encounters.hazard: Gravity shifts causing player to slide periodically.
encounters.trigger: The Knight drops a master key that unlocks the boss chamber doors.

boss.name: Void Warlord Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while the barrier is disabled.

level.objective: Storm the Obsidian Spire and slay the Chaos Warlord to stop the void ritual.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the spirit releases a keening wail that unlocks the gate to the Ossuary.
The knight's collapse shatters the seal leading to the Inner Sanctum.
Slaying the Matriarch causes the ceiling to cave in, revealing the path to the Grave-Lord.

boss.name: Grave-Lord Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Channel the collected shards into the ritual altar to seal his spirit away.

level.objective: Retrieve the Soul-Catcher Amulet from the Wailing Mausoleum to stabilize the necrotic veil.

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Flint
pickup.effect: Ignites projectiles to deal additional fire damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel opens the path to the Iron Sluice Gate.

pickup.name: Bottled Gale
pickup.effect: Adds knockback and wind resistance to arrows

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Construct unlocks the bridge to the Cinder Keep.

pickup.name: Ember-Core Heart
pickup.effect: Provides immunity to heat damage for the boss fight

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Wraith clears the magical barrier guarding the inner Sanctum.

boss.name: Malakor the Ash-Bringer
boss.victory_condition: Extinguish the hearth while defeating Malakor.

level.objective: Traverse the Ashen Waste to extinguish the Corrupted Hearth at the heart of the Cinder Keep.
level.reward: The Ranger's Ever-Bow of the Wilds

level.setting: A decaying, abandoned atmospheric processing station in deep space.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers a pressure lock malfunction that forces entry into the Security Hub.
Deactivating the sentinel triggers the ventilation override, revealing the path to the Reactor Core.
Defeating the bot allows the player to use the keycard to enter the Boss Arena.

level.objective: Restore the atmospheric scrubbers on the derelict station to prevent system collapse.

level.setting: A desolate, abandoned starship drifting on the edge of a black hole.

encounters.trigger: Opening the bay doors initiates a system alert, drawing out a security Sentinel.

pickup.name: Temporal-Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Can reverse the entropy of inanimate objects

encounters.trigger: Disabling the Sentinel unlocks the path to the Engineering Core.
Defeating the Construct clears the path to the bridge for the final confrontation.

boss.name: Entropy Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Use the Master Override Key to seal the temporal rift while boss is stunned.

level.objective: Restore the temporal core of the derelict starship Aethelgard.

level.setting: Drifting orbital platform in high-risk nebula space

pickup.name: Supercharged Battery Pack
pickup.effect: Increases damage of all electrical abilities and weapons by 50 percent

encounters.trigger: Destroying the lock mechanism alerts the secondary drone guard in the Reactor Hall

encounters.hazard: Unstable electrical arcs jumping across the floor

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Can be used to negate high-heat shielding or freeze metallic boss joints

encounters.trigger: Overloading the reactor initiates the automated defense protocol from the Overseer

encounters.hazard: Gravity wells shifting the room orientation every thirty seconds

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Allows access to the final safety protocol during the boss fight

encounters.trigger: Accessing the main terminal forces the station's AI core to manifest physically

boss.name: Omega-Core Singularity AI
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Master Override Key into the central slot after cooling the core

level.objective: Overload the central core of the rogue orbital station to prevent a planetary strike.

level.setting: Abandoned orbital research station orbiting a dying nebula

encounters.hazard: Flickering neon lights that distort visibility

pickup.name: Frequency Modulator
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with shielded energy conduits

encounters.trigger: Upon defeating the bot, the corridor blast door unlocks.

encounters.hazard: Gravity fluctuations causing debris to float

pickup.name: Data Encryption Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the terminal controlling the station's core security

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone reveals a hidden port for the Data Encryption Key.

encounters.hazard: Electric arcs jumping across the floor
encounters.trigger: The defeat of the guardian stabilizes the bridge leading to the boss chamber.

boss.name: Aura-Core Architect
boss.victory_condition: Overload the boss shield using the capacitor.

level.objective: Deactivate the rogue ancient mainframe controlling the station.

level.theme: Industrial decay meets cold, calculating machine logic.
level.setting: An abandoned, drifting orbital research facility above a dying star.

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Temporarily slows biological and mechanical entities

encounters.trigger: Destroying the droid triggers a lockdown alarm, forcing the player toward the server core.
Defeating the sentinel opens the reinforced bulkhead leading to the core chamber.

encounters.hazard: Corrosive neon gas leaking from overhead vents

pickup.name: Master Encryption Key
pickup.effect: Grants complete control over the station's defensive systems

encounters.trigger: Removing the Master Encryption Key activates the final boss AI.

boss.name: Omnis-Prime AI
boss.weakness: Use the Master Encryption Key to force a system reboot, leaving the AI vulnerable to Void-Edge Dagger strikes.
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Master Encryption Key into the terminal while avoiding lethal laser arrays.

level.objective: Infiltrate the derelict orbital spire and neutralize the central AI mainframe.
level.reward: The 'Eclipse Visor' which reveals hidden enemy weak points.

level.setting: A decaying, abandoned space station laboratory orbiting a dying star.

pickup.name: Corrosive Solvent
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to biological organic matter

encounters.trigger: Opening the cryo-door activates the pressure sensors in the hallway.
Clearing the vines reveals the override key for the central elevator.
Defeating the drone grants access to the main reactor control console.

boss.name: The Bio-Alchemist Construct
boss.victory_condition: Apply the Stabilization Catalyst to the boss core while it is stunned.

level.objective: Escape the derelict bio-lab before the reactor core destabilizes.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bot activates the bridge to the Storage Bay.
Calming the kitten triggers the lift to the Vault Roof.
Disabling the sentinel opens the final door to the Boss chamber.

boss.name: The Glitter-Gorgon
boss.victory_condition: Steal the Galactic Glitter-Ball from its chest cavity

level.objective: Retrieve the Galactic Glitter-Ball from the Nebular Vault
level.reward: A golden gravity-board and the title of Space-Glitter Bandit

level.setting: An abandoned orbital station drifting through a nebula

pickup.name: Thermal Vent Valve
pickup.effect: Allows control over extreme heat pockets

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel opens the sealed pressure door to the lava conduits

pickup.name: Sonic Resonator
pickup.effect: Emits high-frequency vibrations that shatter solidified matter

encounters.trigger: Overloading the construct releases the energy signature required to unlock the Core Chamber

pickup.name: Celestial Key
pickup.effect: Used to stabilize the unstable boss aura

encounters.trigger: Clearing the Echo stabilizes the path to the final boss pedestal

boss.name: Grand Prism Architect
boss.victory_condition: Seal the breach before the system collapses

level.objective: Restore the flow of the crystalline energy core
